title: SourcedValue
description: The reusable provenance envelope $ref'd by every fact-bearing field (TRUST-01, DATA-09). A field is fact-bearing if and only if its schema uses this $ref. Phase 1 enforces only the STRUCTURAL claim-type shape; pass-counting and the transcription re-read record are added by the Phase 2 verification gate.

sources.description: One or more source ids resolved against sources.json. uniqueItems is true so a corroborable fact citing ["off","off"] cannot satisfy minItems 2; lineage-level distinctness remains a Phase 2 concern.

confidence.description: Curator certainty (TRUST-02); GRADE 4-point enum kept in sync with meta.json confidenceLevels.

evidence.description: Evidence strength (TRUST-02); GRADE 4-point enum kept in sync with meta.json evidenceLevels.

updated.description: Date this record was last updated.

checkedOn.description: Optional; REQUIRED for regulatory facts by the TRUST-06 referential gate (plan 01-05), rendered by the macro (plan 01-07).

claimType.description: corroborable: an empirical claim about the world (structurally requires >=2 distinct sources). authoritative: what a named authority states (>=1 source).

claimDomain.description: Optional discriminator the TRUST-06 gate keys on; claimDomain "regulatory" triggers the GB-source + checkedOn rule in the referential gate.

verificationStatus.description: Reserved for the Phase 2 verification gate (DATA-11); present-and-empty (null) validates.

publicationStatus.description: Reserved for the Phase 2 publication gate (DATA-11); present-and-empty (null) validates.
